description: Node.js resources for universal transactions via @pushchain/core. Copy the files you need, set env vars, and run with tsx.
setup: npm install && PRIVATE_KEY=0x... npx tsx client-ethers.ts

envVars.PRIVATE_KEY: EVM wallet private key (0x-prefixed hex) — for ethers.js and viem scripts
envVars.SOLANA_KEY: Solana keypair as JSON number array — for client-solana.ts

files.purpose: Full working Node.js script — ethers.js signer, Route 1 (Push Chain) and Route 2 (external chain) sends
Full working Node.js script — viem signer, Route 1 and Route 2 sends
Full working Node.js script — Solana Keypair signer, Push Chain target and Solana program target
